message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: ambassador and vizier-core not starting mission (#642)

files.patch: @@ -0,0 +1,81 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "kubeflow-3259-ambassador-and-vizier-core-not-starting", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "kubeflow: ambassador and vizier-core not starting", + "description": "ambassador and vizier-core not starting. This issue affects 4+ users.", + "type": "troubleshoot", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms", + "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue." + }, + { + "title": "Review kubeflow configuration", + "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\nI am using current master (commit 58022fb) and installed kubeflow on a previously created AWS EKS cluster (thus not using `apply platform` provided by kubeflow)." + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for ambassador and vizier-core not starting", + "description": "As discussed in #3259 I changed the namespace label in the AWS setup for the kubeflow namespace, so that istio injection is by-default disabled.\n\n---\nThis change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/kubeflow/kubeflow/3289)", + "codeSnippets": [ + "$ kubectl -nkubeflow get po\nNAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE\nalb-ingress-controller-596688f5bd-9ls7c 2/2 Running 1 46m\nambassador-796bcd74b5-4p949 1/2 CrashLoopBackOff 13 46m\nambassador-796bcd74b5-gb4pl 1/2 CrashLoopBackOff 13 46m\nambassador-796bcd74b5-rxvvb 1/2 CrashLoopBackOff 9 46m\napp-controller-c6d849967-rmc6q 2/2 Running 0 46m\nargo-ui-bd754894c-twrdk 2/2 Running 0 46m\ncentraldashboard-799849c495-qtxzk ", + "$ kubectl -nistio-system get po\nNAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE\ngrafana-5c45779547-nhl4x 1/1 Running 0 36m\nistio-citadel-6d7f8c5d-wzb9c 1/1 Running 0 36m\nistio-cleanup-secrets-release-1.1-20190111-09-15-hh4ps 0/1 Completed 0 36m\nistio-egressgateway-6f8b444984-p5mt5 1/1 Running 0 36m\nistio-galley-685ffb6bf4-4pmcc 1/1 Running 0 36m\nistio-grafana-post-install-release-1.1-20190111-09-15-tnqs5 0/1", + "$ kubectl -nkubeflow logs vizier-core-744646bc44-77hhq vizier-core \n[mysql] 2019/05/14 14:45:54 packets.go:36: unexpected EOF" + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "kubeflow", + "incubating", + "app-definition", +
